tool_purpose: A pre-trained Faster R-CNN model with Inception-ResNet-v2 feature extractor for object detection on the Open Images Dataset v4. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Detect objects in images. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/google/faster_rcnn/inception_resnet_v2/atrous/oid_v4/1').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
